name: GT-FI
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-first-insertion (proofs/lem-first-insertion/export.md, root node 1), the First-Insertion bound. For x in B(H)_sa and b in A: ||P(Px o b) - P(x o b)|| <= C sqrt(eta) ||x|| ||b||. In particular for n in Ker P (so Pn=0, P(Pn o b)=P(0)=0): ||P(n o b)|| = ||P(n o b) - P(Pn o b)|| <= C sqrt(eta) ||n|| ||b||.
